Class VelocityPlatformProvider

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.velocity.VelocityPlatformProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ShutdownHookRegistrar
public final class VelocityPlatformProvider extends Object implements dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Platform, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.ShutdownHookRegistrar
Platform provider for Velocity runtime.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy)
    Creates a Velocity platform provider with default logger and config directory.
    VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy, Path dataDirectory)
    Creates a Velocity platform provider with default logger.
    VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy, org.slf4j.Logger slf4j, Path dataDirectory)
    Creates a Velocity platform provider with explicit logger and data directory.
    VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy, org.slf4j.Logger slf4j, Path dataDirectory, Object plugin)
    Creates a Velocity platform provider with explicit logger and data directory.

  • Constructor Details

    • VelocityPlatformProvider

      public VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy, org.slf4j.Logger slf4j, Path dataDirectory, Object plugin)
      Creates a Velocity platform provider with explicit logger and data directory.
      Parameters:
      proxy - Velocity proxy server
      slf4j - backing SLF4J logger
      dataDirectory - config/data directory
      plugin - plugin instance used for event registration

    • VelocityPlatformProvider

      public VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy, org.slf4j.Logger slf4j, Path dataDirectory)
      Creates a Velocity platform provider with explicit logger and data directory.
      Parameters:
      proxy - Velocity proxy server
      slf4j - backing SLF4J logger
      dataDirectory - config/data directory

    • VelocityPlatformProvider

      public VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy, Path dataDirectory)
      Creates a Velocity platform provider with default logger.
      Parameters:
      proxy - Velocity proxy server
      dataDirectory - config/data directory

    • VelocityPlatformProvider

      public VelocityPlatformProvider(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer proxy)
      Creates a Velocity platform provider with default logger and config directory.
      Parameters:
      proxy - Velocity proxy server
